detectors.description:
Reentrancy in OKININUSHI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (OKININUSHI.sol#655-779):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (OKININUSHI.sol#719)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (OKININUSHI.sol#793-805)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (OKININUSHI.sol#725)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (OKININUSHI.sol#813)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (OKININUSHI.sol#777)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (OKININUSHI.sol#939)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (OKININUSHI.sol#919)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (OKININUSHI.sol#921)
	OKININUSHI._rOwned (OKININUSHI.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- OKININUSHI._takeTeam(uint256) (OKININUSHI.sol#933-941)
	- OKININUSHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (OKININUSHI.sol#893-929)
	- OKININUSHI.balanceOf(address) (OKININUSHI.sol#481-485)
	- OKININUSHI.constructor() (OKININUSHI.sol#415-445)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (OKININUSHI.sol#777)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (OKININUSHI.sol#947)
	OKININUSHI._rTotal (OKININUSHI.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- OKININUSHI._getCurrentSupply() (OKININUSHI.sol#1089-1099)
	- OKININUSHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (OKININUSHI.sol#945-951)
	- OKININUSHI.constructor() (OKININUSHI.sol#415-445)
	- OKININUSHI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (OKININUSHI.sol#577-599)
